Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3 	Session 4 	Session 5 	Session 6 	Session 7 	Session 8 	Session 9 	Session 10 	Session 11 	Session 12 	Session 13
In this tool training, Dean is going to show you how to use the “I Know I’m Being Successful When” tool. This is a very important tool with the main
focus of narrowing your focus on what brings you joy and what things you should be spending your time and energy on. This may seem like a simple
tool, but the execution of it is very important to your next level and your student’s next level!
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
List 5‐10 things that when you do them you feel like you’re being successful, like you’re living the life you were meant to live.
Fill out the “Prioritize To Grow” section of this worksheet by listing 3‐5 of your ongoing projects.
Score each project on a scale of 1‐5 5﴾ being highest﴿ by the revenue it brings in and then another scale of 1‐5 for how much it aligns
with your values.
Add up those 2 numbers and total them in the last column. This will give you an idea of which projects you should focus on and which
ones you should let go.
Describe what ultimate success means to you.
